naturalPatterns.description: Mimics human-like engagement with variable response times and natural interaction flows for authentic conversations.

hero.headline: I applied to 300 jobs and got 1 interview

pain.intro: After being laid off twice since 2022, I was doing what everyone tells you to do:

turningPoint.title: That interview didn't come from a resume
turningPoint.t1: I replied to a post from someone talking about hiring.
turningPoint.t4: A week later I was speaking with the hiring manager.

contrast.title: And once you see it, you can't unsee it
contrast.p2: Every hiring manager is already on LinkedIn.
contrast.bad: uploading resumes into a black hole

problem.title: The problem
problem.p1: This sounds obvious in hindsight, but actually doing it sucks.

builder.title: So I built something for myself
builder.bridge: I built this for my job search first, then realized founders, consultants, and sales teams needed the same authentic conversation workflow.

whatItDoes.title: What it actually does (no fluff)
whatItDoes.b1: Finds posts from people hiring or talking about roles
whatItDoes.b3: Helps you get replies instead of being ignored

after.title: What happened after
after.imageAlt: A Junior-generated comment on a hiring post, and the recruiter's reply scheduling outreach
after.tail: And that's where opportunities actually come from.

skeptical.title: If you're skeptical, that's fair
skeptical.p2: But I also know what it feels like to:
skeptical.tail: This was the only thing that worked for me.

offer.title: If you want to try it
offer.p1: I made it available as a product.
